rule_text: GO Ms No 94/2003 (I&CAD PW-COD) is the comprehensive AP foundational order on tender procedures and contractor registration — superseding GO 521/1984, GO 132/1998, GO 23/1999, and GO 8/2003.
source_clause: GO Ms No 94 / I&CAD (PW-COD) Dept dated 01-07-2003, Order Para 3
verification_method: Treat GO 94/2003 as the original/legacy AP works tender authority; later AP GOs (62/2021, 57/2024, 79/2020) modify specific portions but baseline procedures fall back to GO 94 unless overridden
